patch_name: Into the Fray Patch 4 / Arcane and Frost Patch
description: Into the Fray Patch 4 / Arcane and Frost Patch (9 August 2022) — Magic Staff Overhaul: Arcane and Frost Staffs, Season 15 Winner Statue Unveiled, UI & Quality-of-Life Improvements, Black Zone Loot Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Magic Staff Overhaul: Arcane and Frost Staffs
sections.searchable_text: Magic Staff Overhaul: Arcane and Frost Staffs Into the Fray Arcane and Frost Staffs Combat Balance Changes

sections.heading: Season 15 Winner Statue Unveiled
sections.searchable_text: Season 15 Winner Statue Unveiled Elevate Team Pilas RAQ

sections.heading: UI & Quality-of-Life Improvements

items.text: The Building Nutrition UI has been updated with new fields and shows how much nutrition is being added. This affects player buildings, Hideouts, and Territories.
The Trade UI layout has been updated and now displays the Silver amount bid by each side at the upper left.

sections.searchable_text: UI & Quality-of-Life Improvements The Building Nutrition UI has been updated with new fields and shows how much nutrition is being added. This affects player buildings, Hideouts, and Territories. The Trade UI layout has been updated and now displays the Silver amount bid by each side at the upper left.

sections.heading: Black Zone Loot Changes

items.text: The killed player's allies (same party, guild or alliance)
The player that dealt the killing blow

subitems.text: The killer's allies

items.text: The player that dealt the most damage to the killed player

subitems.text: That player's allies

items.text: After 90 seconds the corpse can be looted by any player

sections.searchable_text: Black Zone Loot Changes The killed player's allies (same party, guild or alliance) The player that dealt the killing blow The killer's allies The player that dealt the most damage to the killed player That player's allies After 90 seconds the corpse can be looted by any player

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Might from Castle and Outpost Chests is now distributed to the guild's members in a larger radius, to better include all participants
Hideout Power Cores and Territory Energy Crystals will now award Might to the captor, any guild members that are within range, and any eligible guild members that have recently helped in its capture
Added buttons to the character stats window enabling you to directly contact players via whisper or mail
Pieces of furniture in the open world must be placed at least 10 meters apart

subitems.text: This distance only applies to other furniture objects and not walls or terrain
This doesn’t apply on Player Islands, Guild Islands, in Hideouts, or in Cities

items.text: The Faction Warfare "Last Stand" buff no longer prevents the Journey Back ability
The Faction Warfare Flagging Bonus can no longer be purged
Level 6+ Crystal League Championship tokens no longer appear in the Marketplace

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

items.text: Arcane Protection (all Arcane Staffs)

subitems.text: Shielded target is now immune to Forced Movement effects
Blocking a Forced Movement effect will remove the shield
The shield no longer affects threat generation
Cooldown: 5s → 6s

items.text: Removed the ability Energy Bolt (all Arcane Staffs)
New Q-slot Ability Chain Missile (all Arcane Staffs)

subitems.text: Shoot a Chain Missile in the targeted direction
Upon hitting an enemy, it will jump to the closest enemy within 8m, dealing 121 magical damage (can hit up to 3 targets; cannot hit the same target multiple times)
Applies one Arcane Charge to all enemies hit
Arcane Charges are consumed when you deal direct damage to the affected target, dealing an additional 61 magical damage

items.text: Magic Shock (all Arcane Staffs)

subitems.text: Damage: 150 -> 135

items.text: Frazzle (all Arcane Staffs)

subitems.text: Cast Range: 11m -> 13m
Casttime: 1.2s -> 0.6s
Cooldown 10s -> 12s
Now reduces enemy resistances (instead of bonus defense vs players)
Resistance Reduction Duration 5s -> 4s

items.text: Empowering Beam (all Arcane Staffs)

subitems.text: The caster can now move during the channel

items.text: Mimic (all Arcane Staffs)

subitems.text: Cast Range: 11m -> 15m
Mimicked abilities
Axes: Raging Blades -> Battle Rush
Frost Staffs: Frost Nova -> Glacial Obelisk
Maces: Snare Charge -> Guard Rune

items.text: Removed the ability Energy Beam (all Arcane Staffs)
Added new W-slot Ability Enigma Blade (all Arcane Staffs)

subitems.text: Combine up to two abilities; combo resets after 4s
1st ability, Enigma Blade
Conjure a magic blade that hits all enemies in a cone in the targeted direction, dealing 200 magical damage
Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability
2nd ability, Flicker
Teleport to the targeted position (cannot teleport through obstacles)

items.text: Arcane Orb (one-handed Arcane Staff)

subitems.text: Projectile Speed: 14.4 m/s -> 17.7 m/s

items.text: Time Freeze (Great Arcane Staff)

subitems.text: Now also affects allies (group-, guild- and alliance members only)
Freeze Duration vs players: 4s -> 2s (remains 4s vs Mobs)
Hit Delay: 1.1s -> 0.5s
Base cooldown: 39s -> 50s
Cooldown reduction per 100 Item Power: 0.8s -> 1s

items.text: Black Hole (Witchwork Staff)

subitems.text: Radius: 5m -> 6m

items.text: Time Corridor (Occult Staff)

subitems.text: Now always costs 15% energy
Base cooldown: 30s -> 44s
Cooldown reduction per 100 Item Power: 0s -> 1s

items.text: Dark Sphere (Evensong)

subitems.text: Hit Delay: 0.6s -> 0.4s

items.text: Removed the Passive ability Aggressive Caster (all Arcane Staffs)
Added a new Passive ability Lingering Power

subitems.text: After casting any spell, increases your Attack Speed by 120% and your Attack Range by 33% for the next three normal attacks within 3s

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs

items.text: Removed the Q-slot Ability: Frost Bolt (all Frost Staffs)
Added new Q-slot Ability: Frostbite (all Frost Staffs)

subitems.text: Shoot a projectile in the targeted direction, dealing 128 magical damage upon impact with an enemy; increases your damage by 4% for 2.5s (stacks up to 3 times)

items.text: Removed the Q-slot Ability: Hoarfrost (all Frost Staffs)
Added new Q-slot Ability: Frozen Surge (all Frost Staffs)

subitems.text: Freeze the ground in front of you along a 16m long and 3.8m wide path, dealing 80 magical damage
Slows all enemies hit by 20% for 3s

items.text: Frost Bomb (all Frost Staffs)

subitems.text: Now instantly slows enemies by 20% while the bomb is building up

items.text: Frost Nova (all Frost Staffs)

subitems.text: Range: 11m -> 9m
Stun Radius: 5m -> 3m

items.text: Frost Beam (all Frost Staffs)

subitems.text: Channel Tick Interval: 0.5s -> 0.3s
Channel Duration: 4.5s -> 2.7s

items.text: Removed W-slot Ability Shatter (all Frost Staffs)
Added new W-slot Ability Frost Lance (all Frost Staffs)

subitems.text: Fire a Frost Lance from a targeted position in a chosen direction
Hitting an enemy causes the lance to explode, dealing 145 magical damage to all enemies within 3m radius
Decreases damage resistances of all enemies hit by 0.16 for 4s

items.text: Added new W-slot Ability Glacial Obelisk (all Frost Staffs)

subitems.text: Create a Glacial Obelisk at the targeted position, lasting 6s
Increases all damage and the Cooldown Rate of up to 10 allies within a 6m radius of the Obelisk by 15%
Recast ability to detonate the Obelisk, dealing 70 magical damage within a 5m radius
Slows all enemies hit by 40% for 4s

items.text: Freezing Wind (one-handed Frost Staff)

subitems.text: Standtime 0.2s -> 0.4s
Area cone reduced by 1m

items.text: Hail (Great Frost Staff)

subitems.text: Each Hail wave can now be cast independently
Damage per wave: 119 -> 150
Damage is now reflectable

items.text: Avalanche (Hoarfrost Staff)

subitems.text: Reworked ability
Launch a giant snowball in the targeted direction, rolling over all enemies
Deals 60 magical damage (cannot be reflected)
The snowball starts with a 2m radius, growing up to 3.1m while rolling
Leaves behind a freezing trail that lasts 4s
Slows all enemies on it by 40%
Recast to make the snowball explode, dealing 160 magical damage (cannot be reflected)
Stuns all enemies hit for 1,33s

items.text: Frozen Crystal (Chillhowl)

subitems.text: Now called Glacial Prison

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs

items.text: Smite (all Holy Staffs)

subitems.text: Hit Delay: 0s -> 0.15s

subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Smite (all Holy Staffs) Hit Delay: 0s -> 0.15s

subsections.heading: Maces

items.text: Air Compressor (all Maces)

subitems.text: Standtime: 1s -> 0s

items.text: Root Prison (Morning Star)

subitems.text: Has been reworked and is now called Gravitas
Combine up to two abilites; combo resets after 3s
1st ability Close In
Dash towards the targeted position
2nd ability Gravitas
Conjure a high gravity field with a 5m radius around you, rooting all enemies (ignoring crowd control resistance), while channeling for up to 4s (cannot be interrupted)
At the end of the channel enemies remain rooted for 1.5s
Hitting less than 3 enemy players ends the root after 1.5s (mobs are not affected by this condition)

subsections.searchable_text: Maces Air Compressor (all Maces) Standtime: 1s -> 0s Root Prison (Morning Star) Has been reworked and is now called Gravitas

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Party UI fixes

subitems.text: Members with no role, or who are in a different zone, now appear lowest on the list if sorted by roles
Targeted party member now highlighted in member list

items.text: General UI fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where Territory UI did not close when an attack started
Fixed issue where items could vanish when two players moved them to or from a guild vault at the same time
Fixed issue where some display elements would not appear after closing the World Map in recording mode
Fixed issue where Guild Rights Management UI lagged when scrolling
Fixed issue where cooldown duration of Guild Crest change would not display

items.text: Spell fixes

subitems.text: Evasive Jump (Royal Shoes) provides immunity to knockbacks
Ethereal Path (Harvester Workboots) move speed buff ends when mounted
Throwing Blades (all Daggers) deals damage to mounts
Fixed issue where changing a spell slot could result in an incorrect cooldown for that spell
Fixed issue where vanity ability keyboard shortcuts did not work while in recording mode

items.text: Additional graphical, UI, terrain, audio, and localization fixes
